title: China's Meituan says new AI model trained on domestic chips
description: Chinese tech firm Meituan launched a new artificial intelligence model on June 30 that it said was the first of its size to be trained using domestically developed computer chips.
content:
BEIJING: Chinese tech firm Meituan launched a new artificial intelligence model on June 30 that it said was the first of its size to be trained using domestically developed computer chips.

title: Techie Quits Rs 9.4 Crore Google Job To Launch His Own AI Start-Up
description: Driven by tech layoff fears and the fear of missing out on the artificial intelligence boom, he used his personal savings to bootstrap a new venture creating automated tools for sales professionals.

title: Chipmakers invest $880B in S. Korean AI industry
description: South Korea is orchestrating investments of at least $880 billion from companies including Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. into chips and data centers, a giant outlay in digital infrastructure it called essential to surviving the artificial intelligence era.

title: CEP IIT Delhi Launches Applied AI, Machine Learning and Decision Science Programme to Help Professionals Move Beyond Models to Business Impact
description: New Delhi [India], June 30: Artificial intelligence has become one of the most sought-after skills in the modern workforce. Organisations across industries are investing heavily in AI, machine learning, automation, and data-driven transformation initiatives. Yet, as AI adoption matures, a new challenge is emerging. While many professionals can build models and generate insights, far fewer know how to translate those outputs into structured decisions that drive measurable business outcomes.
